mapper.select: SELECT code_id, parent_id, code_key, code_value, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM code_table ORDER BY parent_id, code_key, code_value
SELECT code_id, parent_id, code_key, code_value, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM code_table WHERE code_key = #{codeKey} ORDER BY code_id LIMIT 1
SELECT code_id, parent_id, code_key, code_value, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM code_table WHERE code_key = #{codeKey} ORDER BY code_value, code_id
SELECT code_id, parent_id, code_key, code_value, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM code_table WHERE code_id = #{codeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO code_table ( parent_id, code_key, code_value, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{codeKey}, #{codeValue}, #{description}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW(), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE code_table SET parent_id = #{request.parentId}, code_key = #{request.codeKey}, code_value = #{request.codeValue}, description = #{request.description}, use_yn = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.useYn}, ''), 'Y'), updated_by = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE code_id = #{codeId}
